ranks.name: Recruit
requirements: Join the Slayers (react to the guild emote in #comfy-roles)

ranks.name: Thrall
requirements: Complete 5 general summons (Know your Enemies I & II, Intermediate Killer, Clash of Titans, Air Drop)
Kneel at HQ and request Viking Trainee

ranks.name: Thegn
requirements: Complete 10 summons (Blacksmith I, Bonking Bonemass, Crusader, Fenrir's Children, Helpful Hunter)

ranks.name: Jarl
requirements: Class challenges: Death from Above, Full House, Swift Sneak, Self Sufficient, Silent Killer, Gjallarhorn Come, Back Stabber, Cold Shot, Falling Hard, Skilled Rogue
